provided_as_long_as_in_case.name: Provided As Long As In Case

questions.question: Rewrite with unless: If you do not hurry, you will be late. {a1}.

a1.answer: Unless you hurry, you will be late
options: Unless you hurry, you will be late
Unless you do not hurry, you will be late
If you hurry, you will be late

questions.question: Choose the first conditional paraphrase: {a1}.

a1.answer: If it rains, we will stay inside
options: If it rains, we will stay inside
If it rained, we would stay inside
If it had rained, we would have stayed

questions.question: Choose the unreal present condition: If I had more time, {a1}.

a1.answer: I would learn Spanish

questions.question: Choose the past unreal result: If she had called, {a1}.

a1.answer: I would have helped her

questions.question: Choose the mixed conditional meaning: If he had studied medicine, {a1}.

a1.answer: he would be a doctor now
options: he would be a doctor now
he will be a doctor now
he would have been a doctor yesterday

questions.question: Rewrite regret about the past: I {a1}.

a1.answer: wish I had listened

questions.question: Rewrite preference about another person: I {a1}.

a1.answer: would rather you did not smoke here
options: would rather you did not smoke here
would rather you do not smoke here
would rather not you smoke here

questions.question: Rewrite strong advice: You {a1}.

a1.answer: had better leave now

questions.question: Rewrite with as long as: You can borrow it {a1}.

a1.answer: as long as you return it tomorrow
options: as long as you return it tomorrow
in case you return it tomorrow

questions.question: Preserve condition and result: Unless the team improves, {a1}.

a1.answer: it will lose the match
options: it would have lost the match

questions.question: Correct the unless mistake: {a1}.

a1.answer: Unless you study, you will fail
options: Unless you study, you will fail
Unless you do not study, you will fail
If you study, you will fail

questions.question: Rewrite present regret: I {a1}.

a1.answer: wish I knew the answer
